0.details:
They are meant to be together
I have seen their love grow and flourish throughout the years
We celebrate your commitment to each other
Congratulations on your marriage and I wish you a lifetime of happiness
0.model_generation: Friends and family, I am honored to stand here today, celebrating two souls whose path was always meant to merge. From the earliest moments I witnessed between you, there was an undeniable bond—a spark that grew into a love both tender and strong. Over the years, I’ve seen your partnership blossom through laughter, shared dreams, and unwavering support. You lift each other up, challenge one another to grow, and remind us all what true commitment looks like. Today we celebrate the promise you make to journey side by side, through every triumph and challenge life holds. May your marriage be filled with endless joy, deep understanding, and adventures yet to come. Congratulations on finding in each other a partner, a confidant, and a best friend. Here’s to a lifetime of happiness, love that only deepens with time, and countless beautiful memories shared together.
0.final_version: Friends and family, I am honoured to stand here today, celebrating two souls whose path was always meant to cross. From the earliest moments I witnessed between you, there was an undeniable bond, an unbreakable spark that grew into a love both tender and strong. Over the years, I’ve seen your relationship blossom through laughter, shared dreams, and unwavering support. You lift each other up, challenging one another to grow, and remind us all what true commitment looks like. Today we celebrate the promise you made to journey side by side, through every triumph and challenge life holds. May your marriage be filled with endless joy, deep understanding, and adventures yet to come. Congratulations on finding in each other a partner, a confidant, and a best friend. Here’s to a lifetime of happiness, love that only deepens with time, and countless beautiful memories shared together.

1.details:
I deeply regret any pain or discomfort I caused you
My actions were very hurtful and inappropriate
I apologize for my bad behaviour
Your understanding and forgiveness would mean a lot to me
1.model_generation:
Hello,

I am writing to express my sincere apology for my recent behavior. I deeply regret any pain or discomfort I caused you. My actions were very hurtful and inappropriate, and I feel ashamed for letting things get to that point. You did not deserve to be treated that way, and I take full responsibility for every word and deed that caused you harm.

Please know that I recognize the impact of what I did and how wrong it was. I apologize for my bad behavior. I am committed to learning from this mistake and ensuring it never happens again.

Your understanding and forgiveness would mean a lot to me. I value our relationship and will strive through future actions to show how much you mean to me. Thank you for taking the time to read this letter. I hope we can move forward and rebuild the trust I have broken.

Sincerely,
1.final_version:
Hello,

I am writing to express my sincere apology for my recent behaviour. I deeply regret any pain or discomfort I caused you. My actions were very hurtful and inappropriate, and I feel ashamed for letting things get to that point. You did not deserve to be treated that way, and I take full responsibility for every word and actions that caused you harm.

Please know that I recognize the impact of what I did and how wrong it was. I apologize for my bad behavior. I am committed to learning from this mistake and ensuring it never happens again.

Your understanding and forgiveness would mean a lot to me. I value our relationship and will strive through future actions to show how much you mean to me. Thank you for taking the time to read this letter. I hope we can move forward and rebuild the trust I have broken.

Sincerely,

2.details:
I appreciate every single time you have helped me
Words are not enough to express how much you have held me through difficult times
I thank you for everything you have done for me
2.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

Thank you for every moment you’ve helped me. Your unwavering support has carried me through times when I felt overwhelmed, and your kindness has made the heaviest days feel lighter. There aren’t enough words to express how deeply I appreciate the way you’ve stood by me, offering a listening ear, practical guidance, and comforting words whenever I needed them most.

Reflecting on the past months, I realize how fortunate I am to have someone like you in my life. Your generosity, patience, and belief in my potential have given me strength and confidence during difficult moments. I am grateful for everything you’ve done: the late-night conversations, the thoughtful advice, and the simple acts of kindness that have meant so much.

Thank you for being my rock and guiding me with compassion and understanding. I truly appreciate all that you’ve done for me.

With heartfelt gratitude,
2.final_version:
Dear Friend,

Thank you for every moment you’ve helped me. Your unwavering support has carried me through times when I felt overwhelmed, and your kindness has made the heaviest days feel lighter. There aren’t enough words to express how deeply I appreciate the way you’ve stood by me, offering a listening ear, practical guidance, and comforting words whenever I needed them most.

Reflecting on the past months, I realize how fortunate I am to have someone like you in my life. Your generosity, patience, and belief in my potential have given me strength and confidence during difficult moments. I am grateful for everything you’ve done: the late-night conversations, the thoughtful advice, the truth telling and the simple acts of kindness that have meant so much.

Thank you for being my rock and guiding me with compassion and understanding. I truly appreciate all that you’ve done for me and please never feel discouraged to be there for me once more.

With heartfelt gratitude,

3.details:
No words can truly match what I feel but can only give you a glimpse of what its like in my heart
I never thought love existed until I met you who thought me how to love myself in order to love you
3.model_generation: No words can truly match what I feel but can only give you a glimpse of what it’s like in my heart. When I stand before you today, I promise to cherish every moment, to honor your dreams and to walk beside you through all of life’s adventures. I never thought love existed until I met you, who taught me how to love myself in order to love you fully. Your kindness inspires me, your laughter uplifts me, and your strength supports me. I vow to be your unwavering partner, to listen with compassion, to encourage your growth, and to celebrate your successes as if they were my own. I promise to share my hopes and fears with honesty, to hold you in joy and in sorrow, and to build a home filled with warmth, trust, and laughter. Today and all days to come, I choose you, my greatest love and my forever.
3.final_version: No words can truly match what I feel but can only give you a glimpse of what it’s like in my heart. As I stand before you today, I promise to cherish every moment, to honour your dreams and to walk beside you through all of life’s adventures. I never thought love existed until I met you, who taught me how to love myself in order to love you fully. Your kindness inspires me, your laughter uplifts me, and your strength supports me. I vow to be your unwavering partner, to listen with compassion, to encourage your growth, and to celebrate your successes as if they were my own. I promise to share my hopes and fears with honesty, to hold you in joy and in sorrow, and to build a home filled with warmth, trust, and laughter. Today and all days to come, I choose you, my greatest love and my forever. I will always love you no matter the weather, no matter the time...

4.details:
I will always have faith and I will always believe in you
No matter how things get tough, I will always be your number one supporter
You are worth every effort
4.model_generation: Sometimes life throws challenges our way that seem impossible to overcome. I want you to know that I will always have faith in you and truly believe in your ability to rise above any obstacle. When the road feels rocky and every step forward feels heavy, I promise to be your unwavering champion. No matter how things get tough, you can count on me to be your number one supporter, offering my whole heart, my patience and my determination to help you keep going. You are worth every effort, every moment of care, and every ounce of energy I can give. Your dreams, your happiness and your well-being matter deeply to me. Lean on me when you need a reminder of your own strength, and know that together we can face anything. Keep believing in yourself, because I believe in you, always. There is nothing you can’t achieve with dedication and resilience.
4.final_version: As my loved one, I will never forsake you nor give up on you. You are my pride, my joy, my happiness as I am to you...One can never throw away their loved one no matter what. I will always have faith and I will always believe in you. My trust will always lie in you and everything will be well sooner that we think. No matter how things get tough, I will always be your one supporter whether the others turn their backs on you, I will always be here for you. You are worth every effort that is there to find. I wish you could see yourself the way I see you, as I am very sure that you see every reason to always go forward and to never give up no matter what. You are heard, you are seen, you are loved, you are valid and awesome!

5.details:
Wow, time really flies
I thought friendship was all about seeing friends every day
Oh no matter the distance nor the time we will still reconnect like we saw each other yesterday
5.model_generation:
Hey there,

Wow, time really flies! It feels like yesterday we were meeting up every day, catching up over coffee and laughter. I used to think friendship meant seeing each other constantly, but life has taken us down different paths since college. Yet, no matter the distance or the time that passes, whenever we reconnect, it's as though we never missed a beat.

I've been thinking about all our memorable adventures – movie marathons, impromptu road trips, late-night talks. I hope you’re doing well and thriving in what you’re pursuing. I'd love to hear about what’s new in your world: family, work, hobbies—anything you want to share.

Let's find a time to catch up soon—phone call, video chat, or in person. Even with miles between us and busy schedules, I cherish our bond. No matter how long it's been, I know our friendship picks up where we left off.

Take care and talk soon!
5.final_version:
Hello old friend,

Wow, time really flies because we have grown so much. The last time laid my eyes on you was way back but you have changed and you are much more different now. Although it has been long, I love the way we just reconnect back like we just met yesterday. I have always thought that friendship was all about seeing friends everyday but it has come to my realisation that the friends you see after a while and getting a chance to still reconnect with them are the top tier friends. We might have different likes and dislikes now but that didn't pause nor put a stop to our friendship all these years. As we are still one and we will always be one. Oh no matter the distance nor the time we still reconnect like we saw each other just a few hours ago or yesterday which always resembles true friendship.

post_survey.feedback: I liked the part where you edit the Ai generated response
